nasb.text: Ascribe to the Lord, O families of the peoples, Ascribe to the Lord glory and strength.

esv.text: Ascribe to the Lord, O families of the peoples, ascribe to the Lord glory and strength!

cnv.text: 列國的萬族啊！你們要歸給耶和華， 要把榮耀和能力歸給耶和華。

ccb.text: 万族万民啊， 要把荣耀和能力归给耶和华， 归给耶和华！

csbs.text: 万民中的万族啊，你们当把荣耀和力量 归给耶和华，归给耶和华！
